description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a semi-rimless frame with a bold, angular browline and thin temples. The frame is predominantly a warm yellow-gold color, contrasting with the dark, nearly opaque lenses that provide substantial coverage for the eyes. The bridge is a simple, narrow black piece connecting the two lenses, with small, rounded nose pads for comfort. The temples are straight and slender, curving gently at the ends to fit securely over the ears. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible embellishments or branding. The glasses are lightweight and designed for everyday urban use, offering both fashion and sun protection.
description: A modern pair of semi-rimless sunglasses with a yellow-gold frame, dark lenses, and thin, straight temples. The design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold yellow-gold browline, dark lenses, and the narrow black bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temple and the gentle curve at the ear end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame, nose pads, and the full span of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other temple and its curvature.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a semi-rimless, browline style with a prominent, angular upper rim and thin, straight temples. The lower part of the lenses is rimless, giving a lightweight and open appearance. The temples are slender and curve gently at the ends for a secure fit.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark brown, nearly opaque, with a uniform tint that provides strong sun protection. There is no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a narrow, straight piece in black, connecting the lenses with small, rounded nose pads attached for comfort. It is a simple, functional design without decorative elements.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a gentle curve at the tips. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic.
